description: The Set Asset Reference component is used to store an undo step for setting a reference field for assets to another asset.

fields.TargetBefore: The asset value before the change
fields.TargetAfter: The asset value after the change.
fields._performed: Whether the undo step was done or undone.
fields._description: The description of the change that was made and what to for the context menu label text when undoing/redoing.

usage: Not used directly by the user.
